title: Can we link multiple Jira accounts to one Monday.com Account?
excerpt: Our company uses our own Jira board, but also uses client Jira boards to manage accounts. I know we can easily integrate Jira into Monday.com, but is there a way to integrate more than once instance of Jira into an accou…

posts.author: Alliewass (Allie Wassel)
posts.cookedHtml: Our company uses our own Jira board, but also uses client Jira boards to manage accounts. I know we can easily integrate Jira into Monday.com, but is there a way to integrate more than once instance of Jira into an account?

posts.author: emilyw-monday.com (Emily Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Alliewass,

You can connect multiple JIRA accounts. That being said, I would recommend having a board for each account. So one board to manage their internal JIRA account and another for the JIRA account with their clients.

The reason is the data will move over to JIRA, but the integration column cannot have links to both Jira instances.

You can learn more about the JIRA integration here: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360002296399-Jira-Cloud-Integration?abcb=29399

Hopefully this helps!

Emily

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
